productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Apelido Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe adidas Apelido is  a great looking pair that'll class up your off-duty ensemble effortlessly. Kick those tired pair of flip flops away and opt for this stylish pair instead. The outsole is coloured to match the upper (a design detail we just love) so you can wear this with your favourite black denims. What's more you can use this pair as trainers as well!Product DetailsBlack round toed upper with mesh upper and synthetic overlays, has the Adidas 3-Stripe at the midfootPadded inner and central lace-ups with perforations at the side overlaysFoam midsole at the heelTPU outsole with an upraised heel and a pivot point at the big toe mound Material and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
